description: Add comprehensive Storybook stories for the multi-instance URL configuration UI in ConfigDialog. The InstanceUrlField component (added in the multi-instance feature) has no dedicated stories covering its visual states, interactions, and edge cases.

userStories.title: Add multi-instance ConfigDialog Storybook stories
userStories.description: Add comprehensive Storybook stories for the InstanceUrlField component within ConfigDialog, covering all visual states and edge cases of the multi-instance URL configuration UI.
acceptanceCriteria: Story: SingleInstance — ConfigDialog with one url entry pre-filled (production only)
Story: MultipleInstances — ConfigDialog with 2-3 url entries pre-filled (production + staging + dev)
Story: EmptyUrlField — ConfigDialog with url field showing a single blank row (initial setup state)
Story: UrlFieldWithError — ConfigDialog showing validation error states (duplicate name, invalid URL, empty required)
Story: UrlFieldOptional — ConfigDialog with optional url field (no required marker, remove button on all rows, can be empty)
Story: UrlFieldAddRemove — ConfigDialog demonstrating add/remove instance interaction
Story: MultiInstanceThemePair — ThemeGrid wrapper showing multi-instance in both light and dark themes
All stories use the existing ThemeGrid and Wrapper patterns from ConfigDialog.stories.tsx
No new story files created — stories are added to the existing ConfigDialog.stories.tsx
